message:
Align settings menu values

Keep the /fancy-footer settings list in a stable value column even when widget labels contain wide icons or long names. The fix avoids the narrow hard cap and truncates labels only when the terminal width requires it.

Assisted-by: ChatGPT (pi)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Aligned settings menu widget values
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-04-30T16:12:05.135883Z
+---
+
+The `/fancy-footer` settings menu now keeps widget values aligned, including entries with wide Nerd Font icons or long widget names.
+
+Previously, the built-in widget list could show uneven indentation or push values out of alignment, making the selected row look visually offset.
